sprints.notes: cleric theme published; original untouched; 26 tests pass; biome OOM is PRoot-env limitation (not sprint-specific)

Cleric homepage cloned section-by-section; engagement context retired (contexts/engagement/** + /api/notify + /api/check-beta-access + /[locale]/get-started deleted); /get-started 301-redirect wired in next.config.mjs; getDashboardUrl() helper centralizes all dashboard CTAs; build 21/21 pages PASS, tsc PASS, vitest 118/118 PASS. Lighthouse a11y + live Playwright run deferred to S5 gate.

use-cases page + 3 story sections added; ROUTES.USE_CASES added to shared; nav (header + footer + mobile-menu) updated; i18n keys added to shell+marketing en/pt-br; integrations-catalog.ts static file created; sync-integrations-catalog.mjs script written; sitemap updated; 4 e2e specs written; build PASS (23/23 pages), vitest 124 PASS, tsc PASS. biome OOM in PRoot (env limitation — build confirms no real errors).

625 hardcoded color violations eliminated across 63 production files (bg=0, text=0, border=0). Status-badge + remediation-status-badge fully semantic. clerk-appearance.ts created; ClerkThemeProvider already covers dynamic light/dark Clerk theming. Test files updated to assert on semantic tokens. incidents-visual.spec.ts + theme-audit.spec.ts (15 routes) created. Build PASS, tsc PASS (6 pre-existing test errors unrelated to sprint). biome OOM in PRoot (env limitation — individual file checks PASS).

Dual-persona gate. UX Designer (12 obs: 6 P0 / 3 P1 / 3 P2) + CTO (13 obs: 4 P0 / 5 P1 / 4 P2) reports written at docs/redesign-review/. Consolidated prioritized-issues.md: 3 deduped P0, 5 P1, 4 P2. security-page.tsx now reuses <SecurityFirstSection> (home.securityFirst i18n). Reusable smoke-personas.spec.ts added at tests/e2e/review/ (3 viewports × 8 routes × 2 locales = 48 screenshots + 3 dashboard). biome + tsc + pnpm --filter website build all PASS. Follow-up: Sprint 06 (P0 remediation — AnimateOnScroll opacity:0 SSR + next/dynamic invisible skeletons + SOC2/ISO27001 compliance copy contradiction).
